result.stdout:
Usage: DotNetInstallSdk [options]

Options:
  -LP|--latest-preview     Optional. Install the latest preview version of the
                           .NET Core SDK
  -L|--latest              Install the latest non-preview version of the .NET
                           Core SDK
  -H|--headless <Boolean>  Optional. Install .NET Core SDK in headless mode
                           (default: true)
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information

commands.payload:
Usage: DotNetInstallSdk [options]

Options:
  -LP|--latest-preview     Optional. Install the latest preview version of the
                           .NET Core SDK
  -L|--latest              Install the latest non-preview version of the .NET
                           Core SDK
  -H|--headless <Boolean>  Optional. Install .NET Core SDK in headless mode
                           (default: true)
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information

options.description: Optional. Install .NET Core SDK in headless mode (default: true)
Install the latest non-preview version of the .NET Core SDK
Optional. Install the latest preview version of the .NET Core SDK
